mapper.select:
select concat(COMPKEY , ALARMKY) as rowkey , COMPKEY as compkey , ALARMKY as alarmky , USERACT as useract , CYCLETY as cyclety , date_format(ALARMDT, '%Y-%m-%d') as alarmdt , date_format(ALARMTM, '%H-%i-%s') as alarmtm , date_format(ALAREDT, '%Y-%m-%d') as alaredt , ALARMNM , ALARMTX , ALARMRM , date_format(CREDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as CREDATE , date_format(CRETIME, '%Y-%m-%d') as CRETIME , fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, CREUSER) as creuser , date_format(LMODATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as LMODATE , date_format(LMOTIME, '%Y-%m-%d') as LMOTIME , fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, LMOUSER) as lmouser from oalarm where 1=1 and COMPKEY = #{compkey} and ALARMDT BETWEEN replace(#{alarmft}, '-', '') AND replace(#{alarmtt}, '-', '')
and ALARMDT BETWEEN replace(#{alarmft}, '-', '') AND replace(#{alarmtt}, '-', '')
and ALARMDT = to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD')
and ALARMNM like concat('%' ,#{alarmnm} , '%')
and ALARMTX like concat('%' ,#{alarmtx} , '%')
mapper.insert: insert into OALARM( COMPKEY , ALARMKY , USERACT , CYCLETY , ALARMDT , ALARMTM , ALAREDT , ALARMNM , ALARMTX , ALARMRM , CREDATE , CRETIME , CREUSER , LMODATE , LMOTIME , LMOUSER ) values ( #{compkey} , #{alarmky} , #{useract} , #{cyclety} , replace(#{alarmdt}, '-', '') , replace(#{alarmtm}, ':', '') , replace(#{alaredt},'-', '') , #{alarmnm} , #{alarmtx} , #{alarmrm} , to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') , to_char(now() , 'hh24miss') , #{creuser} , to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') , to_char(now() , 'hh24miss') , #{lmouser} )
mapper.update: update OALARM set CYCLETY = #{cyclety} , ALARMDT = replace(#{alarmdt}, '-', '') , ALARMTM = replace(#{alarmtm}, ':', '') , ALAREDT = replace(#{alaredt}, '-', '') , ALARMTX = #{alarmtx} , ALARMNM = #{alarmnm} , ALARMRM = #{alarmrm} , LMODATE = to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') , LMOTIME = to_char(now() , 'hh24miss') , LMOUSER = #{lmouser} where 1=1 and COMPKEY = #{compkey} and ALARMKY = #{alarmky}
mapper.select: select date_format(ALARMTM, '%H-%i-%s') as alarmtm , ALARMNM , ALARMTX , ALARMRM from OALARM where 1=1 and COMPKEY = #{compkey} and USERACT = #{userData.useract} and ALARMDT = to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD')
